layout.title: Grill, Daily Menu and Lunch near Bundek in Zagreb
layout.description: Dvije Žarulje is a grill and bistro at Ulica Brune Bušića 28 in Središće, close to Bundek Lake, Bundek Park, a school, kindergarten and children's playgrounds.

hero.topper: Zagreb Središće | Ulica Brune Bušića 28 | Near Bundek
hero.p1: Grill, cevapi, burgers, chicken grill and daily cooked dishes in Središće, just minutes from Bundek Lake, Bundek Park, a school, kindergarten and children's playgrounds.

services.heading: Grill Menu
services.p: Cevapi, burgers, chicken breast and mixed platters made for a proper lunch or dinner.

services.heading: Daily Specials
services.p: Cooked dishes such as wine goulash, stews and seasonal homestyle favorites for a lunch break or family meal.

services.heading: Takeaway & Delivery
services.p: Order for pickup or delivery through available platforms such as Wolt and Glovo.

about.title: A grill and bistro in Središće near Bundek
about.p1: Dvije Žarulje is located at Ulica Brune Bušića 28 in Zagreb, in the Središće neighborhood and close to Bundek Lake and Bundek Park.
about.p2: The location is practical for Novi Zagreb residents, parents after school or kindergarten, a walk by Bundek and a quick lunch after the children's playground.
about.p3: Good food does not need to overcomplicate things: quality meat, familiar flavors and portions worth coming back for.

extra.title: From the grill to daily cooked dishes
extra.p1: The grill menu includes cevapi, sis cevapi, burgers, chicken breast and sharing platters, served with flatbread, onion and classic sides.
extra.p2: For guests who want something homestyle, the daily menu brings stews, goulash, fish dishes and fried classics with sides.

portfolio.title: Familiar flavors, quick service and generous portions

items.quote: A good place for a quick, filling lunch, especially when you want grill without a long wait.
items.name: Restaurant guest

items.quote: The cevapi and burgers are satisfying, and the side options make ordering simple.
items.name: Regular guest

items.quote: The daily dishes are a practical option when you want something warm and homestyle during the workday.
items.name: Customer
